title: matelea delascioi
intro: Matelea delascioi is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, also known as the dogbane or oleander family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Matelea delascioi include its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its anti-inflammatory properties which may aid in reducing pain and inflammation. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
